item.title: Forum Statistics

Statistics Mod Version 3 Demonstration (BETA3-2003-03-16)

item.title: QUEST! - The Battle of Lost Souls
item.description:
Orodreth — Wed Jul 14, 2004 11:33 am

I’m sorry that I have not posted a winnAr. Work has been killing me and I recently had eye surgery so I am not in the best frame of mind for this. A final decision will be posted Very Soon Now (tm). Thanks.

Orodreth — Mon Aug 02, 2004 3:42 pm

Update: The winners have been picked and the items updated on the live mud. I am in the process of figuring out the prize structure.

item.title: random observation
item.description:
Aidan — Thu Jul 01, 2004 6:57 pm

someone either needs to save dp or put it out of its misery.

I did it like this

I did it like that

I did it with a wiffle ball bat

Zao — Thu Jul 01, 2004 8:37 pm

W3rd. Or at least put out a rough 3.0 release date to masturbate to.

Let this be my writ of misanthropy

To a thankless world of men

item.title: The Unforeseen Occultesque Following
item.description:
stupidface — Wed Jul 14, 2004 10:25 pm

mudhead

A MUD player who eats, sleeps, and breathes MUD.

Mudheads have been known to fail their degrees, drop out,

etc. with the consolation, however, that they made wizard

level. When encountered in person, on a MUD or in a chat

system, all a mudhead will talk about is three topics: the

tactic, character, or wizard that is supposedly always

unfairly stopping him/her from becoming a wizard or beating a

item.title: What the H-E-double hockey sticks?!?
item.description:
Orodreth — Wed Jun 16, 2004 10:27 am

Detroit beat LA in 5 games?!? And LA’s only win needed a miracle play to get into OT!?!

What a great thing. Now if only the Yankee’s would choke like that.

Discuss.

Aidan — Wed Jun 16, 2004 1:07 pm

before the finals, everyone you would talk to about it - detroit or LA fan - would’ve said that LA is going to kick some ass. people on sportscenter, announcers at games, your friends - everyone.
